channel.title: Red Team on 0xMatheuZ
channel.description: Recent content in Red Team on 0xMatheuZ

item.title: Breaking eBPF Security: How Kernel Rootkits Blind Observability Tools
item.description: Deep technical analysis of bypassing eBPF-based security solutions through kernel-level hooks targeting BPF iterators, ringbuffers, and perf events

item.title: Evading Elastic Security: Linux Rootkit Detection Bypass
item.description: Bypassing YARA rules and behavioral detection through symbol randomization, module fragmentation, XOR encoding, and ICMP reverse shell staging

item.title: Red Team Tactics: Evading EDR on Linux with io_uring
item.description: Learn how to bypass modern defenses with io_uring
